ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user who tweeted */,
  "tweet_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (positive, negative, or neutral) */,
  "topic_model" TEXT /* Topic model of the tweet (e.g., politics, sports, entertainment) */,
  "influencer_score" REAL /* Influencer score of the tweet (based on the user's influence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_twitter_handle FOREIGN KEY ("twitter_handle") REFERENCES twitter_handles ("handle")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_handles" (
  "handle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter handle */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle being tracked */,
  "handle_name" TEXT /* Name of the Twitter handle */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the Twitter handle */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword being tracked */,
  "keyword_category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword (e.g., brand, product, competitor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag being tracked */,
  "hashtag_category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag (e.g., brand, product, competitor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_keywords" (
  "tweet_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-keyword association */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the keyword to the tweet (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_keywords_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag association */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the hashtag to the tweet (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_handles" (
  "client_handle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-handle association */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Twitter handle */,
  "handle_type" TEXT /* Type of the Twitter handle (e.g., brand, competitor, influencer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_handle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_handles_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_handles_handle_id FOREIGN KEY ("handle_id") REFERENCES twitter_handles ("handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_keywords" (
  "client_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-keyword association */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "keyword_importance" REAL /* Importance of the keyword to the client (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_keywords_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_hashtags" (
  "client_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-hashtag association */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_importance" REAL /* Importance of the hashtag to the client (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_hashtags_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was generated */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the client's Twitter handle */,
  "follower_growth" REAL /* Follower growth of the client's Twitter handle */,
  "sentiment_analysis" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the client's Twitter handle */,
  "topic_modeling" TEXT /* Topic modeling of the client's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the access event occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view analytics) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
